parameters.command:
# Parse Claude Code usage from log files
CLAUDE_LOG="$HOME/FAS-operations/logs/claude-usage.log"
GEMINI_LOG="$HOME/FAS-operations/logs/gemini-usage.log"

# Count today's entries
TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)
CLAUDE_COUNT=$(grep -c "$TODAY" "$CLAUDE_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
GEMINI_COUNT=$(grep -c "$TODAY" "$GEMINI_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)

echo "{\"date\": \"$TODAY\", \"claude_requests\": $CLAUDE_COUNT, \"gemini_requests\": $GEMINI_COUNT, \"timestamp\": \"$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)\"}"
